product_overview: VaultRAG is an RBAC-protected REST backend that ingests PDF/CSV content into a vector DB and exposes a streaming RAG query endpoint (/ask) which returns token streams plus a final context metadata payload.
core_goals: Enforce strict HTTP Bearer token RBAC with separate Executive and Employee scopes.
Provide non-blocking ingestion: immediate 202 response for uploads while parsing/indexing runs in BackgroundTasks.
Deliver streaming LLM answers from /ask that end with a special delimiter and a final JSON context payload.
Implement two-stage retrieval (vector search + GPU cross-encoder reranking) for high-quality context.
Enforce system constraints: 25MB upload limit and REST-only API surface (no GraphQL/tRPC).
Ensure data isolation: Employees must not be able to query or access Executive-scoped uploads.

features.name: Ask Pipeline
features.description: Run RAG queries with scoped RBAC and stream tokenized LLM output; on completion emit a delimiter and a JSON metadata payload describing sources.
user_flows:
POST /upload-file with Authorization: Bearer eclipse-vault-2026 and multipart/form-data file (PDF <25MB) -> Receive 202 Accepted immediately (file parsing/indexing offloaded to BackgroundTasks) -> POST /ask with Authorization: Bearer eclipse-vault-2026 and JSON body {query: "Summarize the Q1 deck", user_role: "executive", chat_history: []} -> Receive 200 text/plain streaming response that yields answer tokens progressively, then the delimiter '

__VAULTRAG_CONTEXT__
', followed immediately by the final JSON payload containing source context metadata (source ids, scores, and provenance)

POST /ask with Authorization: Bearer vault-member-2026 and JSON body {query: "Show executive doc", user_role: "employee", chat_history: []} -> Receive 403 Forbidden (RBAC prevents employees from querying Executive-scoped content)
POST /ask without Authorization header and JSON body {query: "Any question", user_role: "employee", chat_history: []} -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Upload Pipeline
features.description: Accept PDF/CSV uploads (multipart/form-data), enforce size limits, and offload parsing, chunking, embedding and indexing to Chromadb via BackgroundTasks; return immediate 202 on success.
user_flows: POST /upload-file with Authorization: Bearer vault-member-2026 and multipart/form-data file (CSV, size 4MB) -> Receive 202 Accepted immediately (server enqueues background parsing, chunking, embedding and indexing into Chromadb)
POST /upload-file with Authorization: Bearer eclipse-vault-2026 and multipart/form-data file (PDF, size 30MB) -> Receive 413 Payload Too Large (reject because file exceeds the 25MB upload limit)
POST /upload-file without Authorization header and multipart/form-data file (PDF, size 2MB) -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Ask Pipeline
features.description: Stream response powered by LLM and RAG

endpoints.description: Ask a question with scoped RBAC

features.name: Upload Pipeline
